en: This was supposed to be a sketch
ko: 이건 내가 소포를 받는 내용의 스케치였어.

en: about me just getting a package. And that guy was supposed to come in
ko: 그리고 그 남자는 평범한 UPS 직원처럼 행동해야 했어.

en: and act like just a regular, ordinary UPS man.
Instead he acted like a raving jackass.

ko: 나미, 캐스팅 담당자를 불러줄 수 있어?

en: Can we get Naomi, our casting person in here, please?
Oh good, Naomi, there you are.
ko: 왜 그 배우를 메신저 역할로 캐스팅했어? 정말 끔찍했어.

en: Why did you cast that actor to play the messenger? I mean, he was horrible.
I tried to do the best job that I could,
but I guess my best wasn't good enough. Why?
Why have I failed where others have succeeded?
ko: 왜 다른 사람들은 성공했는데 나는 실패했지?
